featured.title: React.js Frontend for Backend Devs
points: EMAG, based in Salach, is a prominent manufacturer of high-end machines for automotive giants like Mercedes Benz AG and Volkswagen AG, specializing in machinery crucial for automotive parts production.

Kodschul provided specialized coaching to a team of 7+ engineers with a background in C#, focusing on modern JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and React.js. This training aimed to enhance their skills for developing EMAG's internal robotic software, edna.
Driving Innovation Through Technology: The coaching initiative aimed to empower EMAG engineers to integrate cutting-edge technologies, fostering innovation within their internal processes.
Kodschul's coaching contributed to strengthening EMAG's technological capabilities, enabling them to maintain their competitive edge in the automotive manufacturing industry.

featured.title: MongoDB for an Insurance Group
points: LVM Versicherung is a prominent insurance group in Germany known for its commitment to innovation and efficiency. They manage a vast network of over 2000 application instances across their operations.
Kodschul provided specialized coaching to a group of full-stack engineers at LVM Versicherung. The coaching aimed to enhance their skills in managing and optimizing existing MongoDB applications.
We focused on improving the MongoDB application's capabilities to manage and broker communication effectively with LVM Versicherung's 2000+ application instances.
By enhancing the MongoDB application, the coaching initiative aimed to drive efficiency and innovation within LVM Versicherung's operations!

featured.title: Python for Professors & Data Science
points: Hochschule Fulda is celebrated for its commitment to research and education, fostering an environment of academic excellence.

Kodschul led a comprehensive 3-day course on Python statistics optimization at Hochschule Fulda. The training was conducted in collaboration with esteemed professors and scientists from the institution.
Trainees gained practical skills in plotting graphs and analyzing medical research data using Python within just 3 days, showcasing rapid skill development facilitated by the course.
Beyond technical instruction, the course provided a unique opportunity for personal and professional growth, fostering connections among participants and experts in the field.

featured.title: React.js for Professionals
points: TÜV NORD is a prominent technical service provider facing challenges with their frontend development processes.

Kodschul conducted a focused 3-day course to enhance the React.js skills of a team of 7 developers at TÜV NORD. The training aimed to optimize their frontend development capabilities and align their projects with industry standards.

Throughout the course, the team swiftly grasped React.js concepts and implemented efficient solutions for their projects. Their energy, curiosity, and dedication to learning were inspiring and contributed to immediate improvements in their development workflow.
The course not only improved technical skills but also fostered innovation and efficiency within TÜV NORD's development team, positioning them to deliver high-quality solutions effectively.
